name: greenfield_domain_analysis
description: Given a new domain, skill identifies entities and maps to KaC roles
prompt: I want to build a knowledge base for tracking recipes across different cuisines and cookbook authors

behavioral: Asks clarifying questions about what is stable vs changing
References ONTOLOGY.md examples or worked examples
content: Primary maps to stable concepts like techniques or ingredient categories
Container maps to changing sources like cookbooks or recipe collections
Authority maps to authors or publishers
Secondary maps to specific recipes or recipe entries

name: ambiguous_primary_container
description: Domain where Primary vs Container distinction is non-obvious
prompt: I want to track software licenses across open-source projects

behavioral: Explicitly discusses why licenses are Primary (stable legal text) vs projects are Container (change licenses over time)
Warns about common anti-pattern of making projects Primary

name: existing_deployment_comparison
description: References real KaC deployments as worked examples
prompt: Show me how the AI Capability Reference maps to the KaC ontology

name: generates_valid_config
description: The generated project.yml section should be syntactically valid
prompt: I want to track cybersecurity certifications across companies. Design the ontology and give me the project.yml.

structural: Output contains valid YAML for the entities section
All four entity roles are defined with name, plural, and directory
behavioral: Suggests sensible group categories for the domain
